PowerShell($dbPath = "$env:APPDATA\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\5c21984ab6e46a49eb3ab67e67d3a8a7\\state.vscdb"; $sqliteExe = \(Get-Command sqlite3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)?.Source; if \($sqliteExe\) { & $sqliteExe $dbPath "SELECT key, value FROM ItemTable;" } else { Write-Output "sqlite3 not found, trying Python"; & "D:\\ProgramData\\miniconda3\\envs\\prod\\python.exe" -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(r'$dbPath'\); cur = conn.cursor\(\); rows = cur.execute\('SELECT key, value FROM ItemTable'\).fetchall\(\); [print\(f'{k}: {v[:200]}'\) for k,v in rows if any\(x in \(k+str\(v\)\).lower\(\) for x in ['python','conda','interpreter','terminal','spyder']\)]" })
